submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.description: Free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for autonomous coding. Built for developers doing ambitious software work who need a structured plan-build-verify-review workflow instead of a chat session. Uses a simple core loop with strong defaults, then composes planning, implementation, and verification so you can use the default today or extend it later.

verification.execution_method: Direct POST to the live Formspree-backed submit form discovered on the DeepYard submit page.
verification.success_signal: Form submission returned a redirect to /thanks.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat in adoption_metrics_latest.json, so a fresh third-party discovery surface is more valuable than another internal packet refresh.
DeepYard is an untouched OSS-first AI agent ecosystem directory with explicit support for frameworks, orchestrators, and developer tools.
The live submit page is unauthenticated and executable from this runtime, which made it a real shippable action instead of another blocked lane.
expected_outcome: A qualified directory listing or follow-up mention that routes evaluators to the Codeberg repo first.
replacement_condition: If DeepYard has not listed Ralph Workflow or created any visible referral/backlink evidence by 2026-06-13, treat this lane as pending-only and use the next fresh-action slot on another untouched high-intent surface.
